decisions.title: Standardize weekly capacity at 48h
decisions.decision: Change the default weekly capacity from 40h to 48h across hr_structure.json, generate_morning_report.py, and SKILL.md.
decisions.rationale: 40h underestimated actual working hours. 48h (6-day × 8h) better reflects Fracktal Works operating reality and reduces false OVERLOADED flags.
decisions.outcome: All 21 people in HR structure, all 6 script fallback sites, and SKILL.md docs updated. Regenerate morning report to see corrected workload statuses.

decisions.title: Control Center-first upgrade scope
decisions.decision: Prioritize only Control Center, Linux baseline, and OctoPrint upgrade work; defer Klipper task creation.
decisions.rationale: Reduce scope and complete core platform compatibility quickly.
decisions.outcome: 6 parent tasks with subtasks were created in ClickUp under Control Center and assigned to Swaminath with end-of-week due dates.
